name: Scottie's Pizza Parlor
teaser: A gourmet pizza shop masquerading as a casual slice joint. Multiple locations and killing it on both round and squares.
review: A gourmet pizza shop masquerading as a casual slice joint. They're using primo stuff, they're killing it on both round and squares, and now they have multiple locations.
headsUp: Austin has quietly developed a great pizza scene. This is the anchor of it.
update: The best slice in Texas. The bar for Texas pizza has been raised.
